cycle_space.note: Graph cycle rank = 201 = 240 - 39. But rank(d2) = 120 triangle boundaries kill 120 graph cycles, leaving b_1 = 201 - 120 = 81 independent simplicial 1-cycles.

theorem.physical_significance: H_1(W33) = Z^81 = dim(g_1) of E8 Z3-grading. The cycle space encodes the matter sector: 81 = 27 x 3 = 3 generations of 27-dimensional E6 matter representations.
